prediction.reasoning: The point estimate of $48.95 assumes a very slight positive drift from the current price of $48.89 over 6 days, reflecting general market tendency for stable stocks without specific catalysts. Short-term stock price movements are highly unpredictable. The confidence intervals are calculated using an estimated daily standard deviation derived from typical historical annualized volatility (approximately 18-20% for VZ) scaled by the square root of 6 days, assuming a normal distribution of price changes. This methodology attempts to quantify the inherent uncertainty over a short time horizon.
